programs.title: Shocking dishes
programs.desc: Jarek Nowak goes to Singapore, a city that provides tourists with many delights and surprises.He will look for the strangest dishes and the most interesting delicacies of Asian cuisine.The tasting will start with bird's nest soup, the main ingredient of which is dried swallow saliva, which has extremely health-promoting properties.The locals consider it a real delicacy, and you have to pay dearly for a portion of the soup.Then Jarek will try sheep brain and shark head, before snacking on durian dessert, the smelliest fruit in the world.

programs.title: Moonshiners 11
programs.desc: Further adventures of producers of illegal alcohol.The demand for their products is growing, which is why this business is becoming more and more dangerous.To expand production, new helpers are needed.

programs.title: Man v Food
programs.desc: Adam Richman travels around the United States to face the greatest culinary challenges.It covers the route from Boston to Seattle.He also goes to any other place where he can overeat.

programs.title: Mexico Life 3
programs.desc: The creators of the program follow people looking for their perfect home in Mexico.Most of them dream of constant sun, beautiful beaches and water sports.Some people are looking for an entertaining nightlife, while others are looking for the traditional cuisine of the region.There are also many people who want to live in a secluded and quiet place on the coast.Local real estate agents will help them make a choice and find their own place in Mexican paradise.In each episode, specialists will present the characters with numerous offers from the real estate market, both the more expensive ones, but ready to move in, and the cheaper ones, but requiring renovation.
